# terrible_community_general_lvg_rename (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `vg` (String) The name or UUID of the source VG. See `vgrename(8\`) for valid values.
- `vg_new` (String) The new name of the VG. See `lvm(8\`) for valid names.
